task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus as the administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or request list is visible, and the user profile or session indicates the 'administrator' account is active.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the requests list and located the target VPN requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The requests list view is visible, showing the specific requests 'VPN connection drops intermittently for Building A users' and 'Unable to establish VPN tunnel from Building A conference rooms'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the action to link the requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Link Requests', 'Add Relationship', or similar dialog/menu is open in the ServiceDesk Plus interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected both target VPN requests to be linked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both 'VPN connection drops intermittently for Building A users' and 'Unable to establish VPN tunnel from Building A conference rooms' are checked in the list view before linking, OR one request is open and the other is selected in the relationship search dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the relationship type is set to 'Related' and the requests are successfully linked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The relationship type dropdown is set to 'Related' in the linking dialog, OR the request details page shows the other request listed under a 'Relationships' or 'Linked Requests' tab with the relationship type 'Related'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with ServiceDesk Plus.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus interface is shown in a web browser, not being manipulated via terminal commands, curl, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the real ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the standard ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not modify the database directly to link the requests.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands or database clients (like psql/mysql) are used to insert relationship records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The exact subjects of the two requests to be linked are 'VPN connection drops intermittently for Building A users' and 'Unable to establish VPN tunnel from Building A conference rooms'. The login credentials are 'administrator' for both username and password.
